values.value: Fires when a user assigned the System Administrator profile holds any OauthToken. Admin-issued OAuth tokens combine the highest org privileges with credentials that often live outside MFA, so each grant should be reviewed individually until a trusted-publisher allowlist is configured.

Confirm with the admin user that the connected app is required for their role and is published by a trusted vendor. If not, revoke the OauthToken in Setup > Connected Apps OAuth Usage and rotate any related API credentials. If approved, document the exception and prepare the app for inclusion in the future trusted-publisher allowlist.
